content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach repeatedly names what they see in real time and grounds questions in those reads. Turn 8 is a signature said-vs-shown read ('I see this big smile on your face, and I see your head is confused. I see your thoughts are not quite jiving'). Turn 10 catches the live affect ('Are you enjoying saying that?'). Turn 24 names a somatic signature ('I noticed that you're breathing or something to try to get into yourself') and reads the sadness present in the moment. Turn 30 reads a pattern-level projection dynamic (caregiver-softening) and names it operatively. Reads consistently precede the inquiries rather than coming as blind questions, and they land at moments that redirect the conversation (e.g., turn 8 stops the client's escape into the second topic; turn 24 opens the shame thread).",
  "evidence_turns": [8, 10, 24, 26, 30, 36],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the future-frame as itself the postponing; inverts to now without needing explicit somatic naming."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit said-vs-shown read: names the smile, the confused head, the non-jiving thoughts. Signature AoA read."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracks live affect in the act of speaking — reads enjoyment present in the description of oscillation."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Receives the calibration ('hold off on insights') with 'Okay' — implicit read of the client's pacing need, met without defense."},
    {"turn": 24, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names a somatic signature (the breathing-to-get-into-yourself) and reads the sadness present right now; read precedes the question."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the resistance-to-victim-identity and names the victim status directly — surfaces what the client was bracing against."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pattern-level read of caregiver softness and projection dynamic, named operatively before the question."},
    {"turn": 36, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Diagnostic inversion that surfaces the not-enjoying mechanism — reads that the client needs to see what they DO to block enjoyment."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["trying-to-get-rid-of-the-emotion", "looking-for-whats-wrong"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["rehearsing-how-to-say-it"],
  "notes": "Strong, timely, specific reads throughout. The rehearsing-how-to-say-it read (client opened by saying they were thinking about how to summarize) was not explicitly named, but the other reads more than carry the dimension."
}
